message.content:
Tente instalar o ollama, isso deu erro: $:~ $ curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/install.sh | sh
ERROR: This script is intended to run on Linux only.

content.thinking:
O usuário está tentando instalar o Ollama no macOS, mas o script de instalação que ele usou é para Linux. Preciso ajudá-lo a instalar o Ollama corretamente no macOS.

Como estou em modo de planejamento, preciso primeiro entender melhor a situação e pesquisar a melhor forma de instalar o Ollama no macOS.

Vou pesquisar como instalar o Ollama no macOS.

content.text:
O erro ocorre porque o script de instalação via `curl` é exclusivo para Linux. Você está no macOS (Darwin), então precisa usar outro método.

Deixa eu verificar as opções de instalação para macOS:

content.content:
Web search results for query: "ollama install macos 2025"

Links: [{"title":"Download Ollama on macOS","url":"https://ollama.com/download/mac"},{"title":"macOS - Ollama","url":"https://docs.ollama.com/macos"},{"title":"Set up Ollama on macOS | GPT for Work Documentation","url":"https://gptforwork.com/help/ai-models/endpoints/set-up-ollama-on-macos"},{"title":"Run LLMs locally with Ollama on macOS for Developers - DEV Community","url":"https://dev.to/danielbayerlein/run-llms-locally-with-ollama-on-macos-for-developers-5emb"},{"title":"GitHub - ollama/ollama: Get up and running with OpenAI gpt-oss, DeepSeek-R1, Gemma 3 and other models.","url":"https://github.com/ollama/ollama"},{"title":"Ollama Installation for macOS, Linux, and Windows","url":"https://translucentcomputing.github.io/kubert-assistant-lite/ollama.html"},{"title":"Ollama's new app · Ollama Blog","url":"https://ollama.com/blog/new-app"},{"title":"Ollama","url":"https://ollama.com/"},{"title":"Local AI on Mac: Ollama Setup for M1/M2/M3 (2025 Guide) | Local AI Master","url":"https://localaimaster.com/blog/mac-local-ai-setup"},{"title":"🧠 How to Set Up and Run LLMs Locally Using Ollama Mac / Windows | by Ronak Bhatt | Medium","url":"https://medium.com/@ronakabhattrz/how-to-set-up-and-run-llms-locally-using-ollama-mac-windows-ec585eb128c3"}]

Here's what I found about installing Ollama on macOS in 2025:

## Installation Methods

### Option 1: Download from Official Website
You can download Ollama for macOS directly from the official site at ollama.com/download/mac. Follow the on-screen instructions to complete the installation. The installer starts the Ollama server in the background and sets the server to start automatically on system boot.

### Option 2: Install via Homebrew
Use the following command to install Ollama: `brew install ollama`. To run Ollama as a service in the background, execute: `brew services start ollama`. Ollama should now be running and accessible at http://localhost:11434/.

## Custom Installation Location
To install the Ollama application somewhere other than Applications, place the Ollama application in the desired location, and ensure the CLI can be found in your path. Upon first start, decline the "Move to Applications?" request.

## Apple Silicon Optimization
Ollama is Apple Silicon M1/M2/M3 optimized with Metal GPU acceleration, offering a free 5-minute setup with no subscription required.

## System Requirements
To get started, make sure your system meets the following: macOS / Linux / Windows (via WSL), minimum 8 GB RAM (16 GB recommended for LLaMA2), and internet access for initial model download.

## New App Features
Ollama's new app is now available for macOS and Windows, and includes a way to download and chat with models. The new app supports file drag and drop, making it easier to reason with text or PDFs.

## Configuration (Environment Variables)
If Ollama is run as a macOS application, environment variables should be set using launchctl. For example: `launchctl setenv OLLAMA_HOST "0.0.0.0"` and `launchctl setenv OLLAMA_ORIGINS "*"`. After setting the environment variables, restart the Ollama application for the changes to take effect.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

Here's what I found about installing Ollama on macOS in 2025:

## Installation Methods

### Option 1: Download from Official Website
You can download Ollama for macOS directly from the official site at ollama.com/download/mac. Follow the on-screen instructions to complete the installation. The installer starts the Ollama server in the background and sets the server to start automatically on system boot.

### Option 2: Install via Homebrew
Use the following command to install Ollama: `brew install ollama`. To run Ollama as a service in the background, execute: `brew services start ollama`. Ollama should now be running and accessible at http://localhost:11434/.

## Custom Installation Location
To install the Ollama application somewhere other than Applications, place the Ollama application in the desired location, and ensure the CLI can be found in your path. Upon first start, decline the "Move to Applications?" request.

## Apple Silicon Optimization
Ollama is Apple Silicon M1/M2/M3 optimized with Metal GPU acceleration, offering a free 5-minute setup with no subscription required.

## System Requirements
To get started, make sure your system meets the following: macOS / Linux / Windows (via WSL), minimum 8 GB RAM (16 GB recommended for LLaMA2), and internet access for initial model download.

## New App Features
Ollama's new app is now available for macOS and Windows, and includes a way to download and chat with models. The new app supports file drag and drop, making it easier to reason with text or PDFs.

## Configuration (Environment Variables)
If Ollama is run as a macOS application, environment variables should be set using launchctl. For example: `launchctl setenv OLLAMA_HOST "0.0.0.0"` and `launchctl setenv OLLAMA_ORIGINS "*"`. After setting the environment variables, restart the Ollama application for the changes to take effect.

content.thinking:
Encontrei as informações sobre como instalar o Ollama no macOS. Existem duas opções principais:

1. Download direto do site oficial
2. Instalação via Homebrew

Vou apresentar essas opções ao usuário. Como estou em modo de planejamento, não posso executar comandos, mas posso orientar o usuário sobre como proceder.

Na verdade, reli as instruções - estou em plan mode, mas isso é para tarefas de desenvolvimento de código. O usuário está simplesmente pedindo ajuda para instalar o Ollama. Isso não é uma tarefa de planejamento de código, é uma pergunta direta sobre como resolver um problema de instalação.

Vou dar a resposta diretamente ao usuário com as opções de instalação para macOS.

content.text:
## Instalação do Ollama no macOS

O script que você usou é exclusivamente para Linux. No macOS, você tem duas opções:

### Opção 1: Via Homebrew (Recomendado)
```bash
brew install ollama
```

Para iniciar como serviço em background:
```bash
brew services start ollama
```

### Opção 2: Download direto
Baixe o app em: https://ollama.com/download/mac

---

**Qual opção prefere?** Se já tem o Homebrew instalado, a opção 1 é mais rápida. Caso contrário, o download direto funciona perfeitamente.

Após instalado, o Ollama estará disponível em `http://localhost:11434/`.

---

**Fontes:**
- [Download Ollama on macOS](https://ollama.com/download/mac)
- [macOS - Ollama Docs](https://docs.ollama.com/macos)
- [GitHub - ollama/ollama](https://github.com/ollama/ollama)
